title: bikkia australis
intro: Bikkia australis, also known as the Australian Bikkia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and bark, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Bikkia australis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health ailments, or as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
